title: Amazon.com Gift Cards - As a Bookmark

variation_files.prompt: A close-up, slightly angled shot of a person’s hands gently holding open a hardcover book on a warm-toned wooden surface. The book is open to a page with dense text, and the bookmark is placed horizontally across the page, partially covering the text. The bookmark is long and rectangular, with a white string looped through a hole at its top, extending upward and slightly to the left. The background includes a softly lit, out-of-focus stack of books and another open book with black-and-white images, suggesting a cozy reading environment near a window. Natural light illuminates the scene from the upper right, casting soft shadows and highlighting the texture of the book pages and the wooden surface. The overall composition conveys a calm, intimate moment

title: Amazon.com Gift Card in Gift Tag (Various Designs)

variation_files.prompt: A split-screen composition featuring two distinct items placed side by side on a clean white background. On the left, a plain rectangular card with rounded corners, presented at a slight angle, with a smooth, untextured surface and a solid white color. On the right, the gift tag is shown upright, featuring a bright yellow background panel with a solid yellow top section adorned with small, evenly spaced star patterns. The main body of the tag displays a cheerful design of overlapping circular shapes in various colors, arranged to resemble balloons, with thin vertical lines extending downward from each circle. The tag has a pointed top with a silver grommet through which a twisted purple string is threaded and tied into a small knot at the end. The overall lighting is bright

A vertical gift card holder with a stylized, abstract Christmas tree design printed on its surface, composed of layered beige and off-white curved lines and dotted patterns that form a symmetrical, festive motif. The holder is open and flat, displaying the gift card centered within its middle section. The gift card is positioned horizontally, slightly elevated above the holder’s base, and is held in place by a small, folded tab at the top of the holder. The background of the holder is a textured, natural beige paper, and the overall lighting is soft and even, highlighting the clean, minimalist aesthetic of the packaging.

title: Amazon.com Gift Card with a Holiday Teddy Bear - Limited Edition

variation_files.prompt: A festive holiday scene featuring the gift card plush toy sitting on a wooden surface in front of a softly blurred Christmas tree adorned with warm golden lights and red ornaments. The plush toy is positioned slightly to the left, with two wrapped gifts placed to its right — one in red paper with a white ribbon, the other in brown kraft paper with a white ribbon. A small pinecone with a red ribbon lies to the left of the plush toy. The background is softly out of focus, creating a bokeh effect that emphasizes the warm, cozy, and celebratory atmosphere. The lighting is warm and ambient, highlighting the plush toy and the gifts, with a gentle glow emanating from the tree lights. The overall composition is balanced and inviting, evoking

title: Vintage Plumes Gift Card Holder & Wallet

variation_files.prompt: A hand holds the gift card holder against a plain white background. The hand is positioned on the right side of the frame, with the thumb and fingers gripping the right edge of the product, displaying its front surface. The product is shown in a slightly angled, upright orientation, allowing a clear view of its design. The lighting is bright and even, creating a clean, studio-like appearance with soft shadows under the hand and product. The background is completely uniform and featureless, emphasizing the product and hand as the sole focal points. The hand appears natural, with visible skin texture and realistic proportions, suggesting a real-life demonstration of the product's size and portability.

title: Amazon.com Gift Card with a Holiday Teddy Bear - Limited Edition

variation_files.prompt: A cozy holiday scene featuring the gift card plush toy sitting on a dark wooden surface, positioned slightly to the left of center. The plush toy is surrounded by festive elements: to its right, two wrapped gift boxes — one large in red paper with a white ribbon, and one smaller in brown kraft paper with a white ribbon — are placed side by side. To the left of the plush toy, a pinecone tied with a small red ribbon rests on the surface. In the background, a softly blurred Christmas tree is adorned with warm, glowing lights and red ornaments, creating a bokeh effect that adds depth and holiday ambiance.
